_readme: Webhook tool config for the Caller agent. ElevenLabs dashboard: Agent > Tools > Add tool > Webhook. Replace {PUBLIC_BASE_URL} with the ngrok URL (no trailing slash).
name: log_quote
description: Log ONE fee figure the moment the consultant states it — call this in the same turn you hear the number, once per figure. The response lists items_not_yet_logged: ask for those next, by name. If a previously logged price changes (discount, waiver, correction), call again with is_revised=true and revised_from set to the old amount.

request_body_schema.description: One fee item, exactly as stated on the call. Never round, convert, or estimate.

call_id.description: The call reference from the system prompt ({{call_id}})

item.description: One of: service_fee, university_application_fee, deposit, visa_processing_fee, ihs_surcharge, document_attestation, ielts_booking, other. Use 'other' for anything that fits no category (put what they called it in note).

amount.description: The exact amount stated, digits only

currency.description: Currency of the amount, e.g. GBP. Omit if GBP.

university.description: University this figure is tied to (deposits, application fees) — omit for consultancy-wide charges

is_revised.description: true ONLY when this figure replaces one you already logged (discount, waiver, correction). A waived charge is a revision to 0.

revised_from.description: The old amount being replaced — required when is_revised is true

note.description: Short note in the consultant's own words, e.g. 'file opening charge' or 'refundable facilitation reserve'
